mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0512-01#Sql001 */ RN.TITLE AS TITLE, TO_CHAR(RN.DISPLAYED_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS DISPLAYED_DATE, TO_CHAR(RN.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_TIME, NVL2(RN.DETAILED_FILE,'1','0') AS DETAILED_FILE, RN.RELEASE_NOTE_NO AS RELEASE_NOTE_NO, RNC.MENU_NAME AS MENU_NAME, RNC.SCREEN_NAME AS SCREEN_NAME, RNC.CONTENT AS CONTENT, RNC.RELEASE_NOTE_CO_NO AS RELEASE_NOTE_CO_NO FROM CORDYS.RELEASE_NOTE RN LEFT OUTER JOIN RELEASE_NOTE_CONTENTS RNC ON RN.RELEASE_NOTE_NO = RNC.RELEASE_NOTE_NO
RN.DISPLAYED_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{displayYear} || '0101', 'YYYYMMDD') AND RN.DISPLAYED_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{displayYear} || '1231', 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY RN.DISPLAYED_DATE DESC, RN.RELEASE_NOTE_NO DESC, RNC.RELEASE_NOTE_CO_NO ASC
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0512-01#Sql002 */ TO_CHAR(NVL(MIN(DISPLAYED_DATE), SYSDATE), 'YYYY') AS MIN_YEAR, TO_CHAR(NVL(MAX(DISPLAYED_DATE), SYSDATE), 'YYYY') AS MAX_YEAR FROM CORDYS.RELEASE_NOTE
